title: ForgePlan State
description: Ephemeral session state for ForgePlan. Tracks active node, build progress, and hook control flags. Located at .forgeplan/state.json

last_updated.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of last state write

active_node.description: Currently active node for building. Null when no build is in progress.

agent_status.description: Structured agent status. WORKING=in progress, DONE=complete, DONE_WITH_CONCERNS=complete with caveats, NEEDS_CONTEXT=missing info, BLOCKED=cannot proceed. Agents must set this instead of free-text status claims.

nodes.description: Per-node state tracking. Keys are node IDs.

status.description: Current node status (reviewing/revising are transient in-progress states)

last_build_completed.description: ISO timestamp of when the last build completed. Used by /next to determine if a node has been rebuilt after a revision.

previous_status.description: Status before the current transient operation (reviewing/revising). Used by recovery SKIP to restore the correct state. Set by review/revise commands before changing status.

bounce_count.description: Number of times Stop hook has bounced this node back. Escalates to user at >= 3.

pre_build_files.description: Snapshot of files in the node's file_scope directory at build start. Used by PostToolUse to distinguish new files from pre-existing ones. Set by /forgeplan:build setup.

files_created.description: Files created via Write tool during build (safe to delete on reset). Auto-populated by PostToolUse.

files_modified.description: Pre-existing files modified (via Edit) or overwritten (via Write) during build. NOT safe to delete on reset — need manual revert. Auto-populated by PostToolUse.

last_review.description: Path to most recent review report, or null

revision_history.description: History of revisions to this node

shared_types_created_by.description: Node ID that first created src/shared/types/index.ts. Used by recovery to determine shared types ownership.

stop_hook_active.description: Prevents infinite loops in Stop hook evaluation
